protocols.notes_updates: Ensure plugged into power (green LED), plug oxygen hose into heuer valve, attach HME filter to circuit, attach test lung, switch ON, machine defaults to VC-SIMV, remove test lung and attach to patient

Mode: Volume Assist Control. TV: 6ml/kg (4-6ml/kg IBW). I:E ratio: 1:2. RR: 10-12 bpm. PEEP: 8-12 (titrate to O2 sats). Pmax alarm: <30. FiO2: Titrate down rapidly according to O2 saturation.
Lung protective ventilation - avoid high tidal volumes

Peak pressure: check tubing, ET tube, filter, bronchospasm, mucous plug, patient biting tube. Plateau pressure: check ARDS, lung contusion, pneumonia, oedema, pleural effusion, pneumothorax. Minute volume: check RR, TV, pressure support. FiO2: ensure connected to oxygen.
Check alarm settings and pressure cut-offs are appropriate
Check circuit disconnection, ET tube cuff leak
Titrate to O2 saturations (NIV start at 4cmH2O)
Start 100% if needed, titrate to SpO2 >92%
